name: Ford Green & Smallthorne
description:
Ford Green Road, locally known as ‘Smallthorne Bank’, runs through the centre of this residential community which is made up of numerous streets packed with terraced homes.

At the junction of Ford Green Road and High Lane there are a series of three roundabouts which are a significant landmark on many people’s journeys in the area.

At the bottom of Smallthorne Bank you will find the large open areas provided by Ford Green Nature Reserve and the tutor building ‘Ford Green Hall’.
